universality_class.definition: effectively describable systems that maintain distinguishable commitments, permit constrained commitment or state change, preserve grounds or dependencies relevant to revision, and support finite recovery queries over histories
inclusions: effectively presented stochastic or hybrid reasoning systems
exclusions: input-output-only proprietary processes without adequate traces
systems whose relevant distinctions are inaccessible even in principle
purely physical systems not independently identified as reasoning

requires: uniform finite recovery of registered distinctions
preservation_contract.anti_circularity_rule: the contract states reasoning facts to preserve, not RCCD vocabulary or implementation primitives

effective_representation_family.definition: finite or recursively presented encodings with effective construction and a uniform terminating recovery procedure for every registered finite query

lower_bounds.paired_countermodel: two systems share the same carrier and transition graph but assign different commitment content to one reachable configuration
lower_bounds.separating_query: what proposition or commitment is held at the reachable configuration
lower_bounds.theorem: every P-faithful representation in E must encode a distinction sufficient to recover commitment content

lower_bounds.paired_countermodel: two systems share states and realized history but differ in the permitted next-step set
lower_bounds.indistinguishable_under_ablation: state-only and realized-trace-only encodings identify the pair
lower_bounds.separating_query: which next transitions are admissible before execution
lower_bounds.theorem: every P-faithful representation in E must encode admissibility constraints equivalent to constrained evolution

lower_bounds.paired_countermodel: two systems hold the same conclusion but derive it from different grounds, one of which is later defeated
lower_bounds.separating_query: which commitments must be revised after defeat of a specified ground
lower_bounds.theorem: every P-faithful representation in E must encode grounds or dependency structure sufficient to determine revision consequences

lower_bounds.paired_countermodel: two systems have the same current visible commitments but different supersession histories that alter later admissibility
lower_bounds.separating_query: which prior commitment was superseded and what future revisions remain admissible
lower_bounds.theorem: every P-faithful representation in E must encode historical identity and supersession information sufficient for path-dependent consequences

lower_bounds.paired_countermodel: a uniform effective encoding family and a source-indexed oracle family agree extensionally on sampled behavior, but only the former provides one representation-independent terminating recovery procedure
lower_bounds.indistinguishable_under_ablation: finite observation samples alone identify the pair
lower_bounds.separating_query: whether one fixed effective method recovers every registered finite distinction for every member of the class
lower_bounds.theorem: every representation counted as P-faithful in E must supply a uniform terminating recovery method; source-specific oracle access is not a faithful effective representation

equivalent_reintroduction_bound: any basis that omits an RCCD component from its declared primitives but preserves the associated separating query must reintroduce an equivalent distinction in derived machinery; that machinery is charged
joint_theorem: For C-EFFECTIVE-REASONING-001, preservation contract P-RCCD-FAITHFUL-001, and effective representation family E-EFFECTIVE-REP-001, every faithful representation requires commitments equivalent to RCCD components R1 through R5.
proof_scope: conditional information-separation lower bounds over the registered class and representation family; not unrestricted logical necessity
nonclaims: RCCD is necessary for every possible conception of reasoning
the preservation contract is the only legitimate contract
actual brains or language models internally implement RCCD
RCCD is globally minimal, unique, or universally instantiated
